case_title: JOHN THOMAS HARTNETT VS. MATT WIMALASIRI

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-22-2011 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-07-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WIMALASIRI, MATT AKA MATT HUTCHINSON

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-22-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-22-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY HARTNETT, JOHN THOMAS AS TO DEFENDANT WIMALASIRI, MATT AKA MATT HUTCHINSON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-22-2011 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HARTNETT, JOHN THOMAS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WIMALASIRI, MATT AKA MATT HUTCHINSON STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
